body_txt: A character is having a sexual or a romantic moment with another character. However, one of them, or neither, may not be completely into it. This may be because: As variants of the trope: Lie Back and Think of England is a woman thinking about other things during sex out of boredom, Think Unsexy Thoughts is thinking about something other than sex to delay climax, and the sex-related variant of Wrong-Name Outburst is imagining a different partner during sex and calling their name instead. Compare and contrast Coitus Uninterruptus , where someone nonchalantly multitasks (or deals with incoming matters) during sex. See also Lousy Lovers Are Losers for one possible explanation.
